rateYear.description: Tax year the arnona rates apply to (שנת הארנונה)

rateUnit.description: Unit the rates are expressed in

residentialRates.description: Residential arnona rates by property class, one row per class, with the rate for each zone

zoneARate.description: Rate for zone א (אזור א') in NIS/m2

zoneBRate.description: Rate for zone ב (אזור ב') in NIS/m2

zoneCRate.description: Rate for zone ג (אזור ג') in NIS/m2

zoneDRate.description: Rate for zone ד (אזור ד') in NIS/m2

officeAndCommercialRates.description: Office, business and commerce arnona rates by zone, split by business area size band

rateUpTo300sqm.description: Rate for businesses up to 300 m2 (עסקים עד 300 מ"ר) in NIS/m2

rateAbove300sqm.description: Rate for businesses above 300 m2 (עסקים מעל 300 מ"ר) in NIS/m2

propertyTypeRates.description: arnona for property categories outside the residential and office/commerce tables; emit one row per distinct printed rate: if a category has per-zone or per-size-band sub-rates, emit a separate row for each sub-rate with zone/sizeBand set, otherwise set both to null

propertyType.description: base property category WITHOUT the zone or size-band modifier, as printed (e.g. גני ילדים ומוסדות חינוך, בתי קולנוע, תעשיה, בתי תוכנה, בתי מלון)

zone.description: zone modifier when the category is split by zone (אזור), else null

sizeBand.description: size-band or location modifier when the category is split by area/location, as printed, else null
